seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
org_constraint: The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2.
new_constraint: The schedule must include exactly 4 headers at level 2.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2. The schedule must include exactly 4 headers at level 2.
response:
Here is a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature.

## Project Overview & Goals

This week's focus is on implementing the core functionality of the new "User Profile Customization" feature. The goal is to have a feature-complete, tested, and ready-for-review build by Friday afternoon.

## Daily Schedule Breakdown

| Time Slot | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **9:00 AM - 9:30 AM** | Daily Standup (Scrum) | Daily Standup (Scrum) | Daily Standup (Scrum) | Daily Standup (Scrum) | Daily Standup (Scrum) |
| **9:30 AM - 12:30 PM** | Feature Implementation (Backend) | Feature Implementation (Frontend) | Feature Implementation (Backend) | Feature Implementation (Frontend) | Bug Fixing & Refinement |
| **12:30 PM - 1:30 PM** | *Lunch Break* | *Lunch Break* | *Lunch Break* | *Lunch Break* | *Lunch Break* |
| **1:30 PM - 3:30 PM** | Unit Testing & Integration | UI/UX Review & Refinement | Unit Testing & Integration | End-to-End Testing (QA) | Final Code Review & Polish |
| **3:30 PM - 4:00 PM** | Technical Deep Dive/Pairing | Code Review Session | Technical Deep Dive/Pairing | QA Feedback Session | Retrospective & Planning |

## Team Responsibilities & Focus Areas

*   **Backend Developers:** Focus on API endpoints, database schema updates, and business logic implementation (Mon/Wed).
*   **Frontend Developers:** Focus on UI component creation, state management, and user interaction flow (Tue/Thu).
*   **QA Engineer:** Focus on writing test cases, executing functional tests, and logging bugs (Thu/Fri).
*   **Tech Lead:** Responsible for code reviews, unblocking developers, and leading technical deep dives.

## Key Milestones

*   **End of Tuesday:** Core data structure implemented and accessible via API.
*   **End of Wednesday:** Frontend successfully consumes the core API endpoints.
*   **End of Thursday:** Feature passes initial end-to-end testing with minimal critical bugs.
*   **End of Friday:** Feature is stable, documented, and ready for staging deployment.<turn|>
